allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "SELECT id, org_id, title, chart_type, created_at FROM custom_charts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" crm)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root --host=127.0.0.1 -e "SELECT id, org_id, title, chart_type, global, created_at FROM custom_charts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" crm 2>&1)
